result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) function date_trunc(unknown, text) does not exist
LINE 1: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate), 'Month') AS...
                       ^
HINT:  No function matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate), 'Month') AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, date_trunc('month', createddate) AS month_start
FROM "Case"
WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(orderitemid__c, '#', '')) IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797awIAA','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798VPIAY','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt00000799o1IAA','802Wt0000079A2bIAE','802Wt0000079ACGIA2','802Wt0000079B0EIAU','802Wt0000079B6gIAE')
AND createddate >= '2020-06-01'::date
AND createddate < '2021-04-01'::date
GROUP BY month_start, month_name
ORDER BY month_start;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate), 'Month') AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, date_trunc('month', createddate) AS month_start
FROM "Case"
WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(orderitemid__c, '#', '')) IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797awIAA','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798VPIAY','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt00000799o1IAA','802Wt0000079A2bIAE','802Wt0000079ACGIA2','802Wt0000079B0EIAU','802Wt0000079B6gIAE')
AND createddate >= '2020-06-01'::date
AND createddate < '2021-04-01'::date
GROUP BY month_start, month_name
ORDER BY month_start;

args.query:
SELECT to_char(date_trunc('month', createddate::timestamp), 'FMMonth') AS month_name, COUNT(*) AS cnt, date_trunc('month', createddate::timestamp) AS month_start
FROM "Case"
WHERE TRIM(REPLACE(orderitemid__c, '#', '')) IN ('802Wt0000078yuGIAQ','802Wt00000790mOIAQ','802Wt00000790zGIAQ','802Wt00000794F2IAI','802Wt000007968eIAA','802Wt00000796bfIAA','802Wt00000796qFIAQ','802Wt0000079734IAA','802Wt00000797W5IAI','802Wt00000797awIAA','802Wt00000797z7IAA','802Wt00000798VPIAY','802Wt00000798YdIAI','802Wt00000798okIAA','802Wt00000799o1IAA','802Wt0000079A2bIAE','802Wt0000079ACGIA2','802Wt0000079B0EIAU','802Wt0000079B6gIAE')
AND createddate::timestamp >= '2020-06-01'::date
AND createddate::timestamp < '2021-04-01'::date
GROUP BY month_start, month_name
ORDER BY month_start;
